label: Final Formulation
description: Generates the final ingredient formulation with recommended dosages. Cross-references TCM toxicity and dosage databases to produce a safe, evidence-backed formulation table.

defaultInputs.name: Ranked Candidates
defaultInputs.tooltip: Connect output from the Ranking by Count node.

defaultOutputs.name: SKU
defaultOutputs.tooltip: Stock-keeping unit / product name for this formulation slot.

defaultOutputs.name: 成分 (Ingredient)
defaultOutputs.tooltip: Chinese and Latin name of the ingredient.

defaultOutputs.name: Role
defaultOutputs.tooltip: Functional role in the formulation (e.g. Direct, Supportive, Adjuvant).

defaultOutputs.name: Animal Dosage
defaultOutputs.tooltip: Dose used in animal studies (mg/kg or g/kg).

defaultOutputs.name: HED (human equivalent dosage)
defaultOutputs.tooltip: Human equivalent dose converted from animal data (mg/kg).

defaultOutputs.name: Extract Type
defaultOutputs.tooltip: Extraction method or form of the ingredient.

defaultOutputs.name: Reference (dosage)
defaultOutputs.tooltip: Dosage reference notes from pharmacopoeia or clinical guidelines.

configSchema.label: Reference databases
configSchema.tooltip:
Select TCM pharmacopoeia databases to cross-check ingredient toxicity and dosage recommendations.

> **大医 (dayi.org.cn)** — Traditional Chinese Medicine clinical practice reference
> **中华人民共和国药典 (chp.org.cn)** — Official Pharmacopoeia of the People's Republic of China

options.label: 中华人民共和国药典 – ydz.chp.org.cn (Official Chinese Pharmacopoeia)

configSchema.defaultValue:
**TCM Dosage & Toxicity References**

The selected databases are used to verify safe dosage ranges and flag potential toxicity concerns for each ingredient:
- [dayi.org.cn](https://www.dayi.org.cn/) — clinical TCM dosage reference
- [ydz.chp.org.cn](https://ydz.chp.org.cn/#/main) — Pharmacopoeia of the People's Republic of China

Always consult a qualified TCM practitioner before finalising formulations.
